description: Configure Jitsi Meet to enforce a mandatory pre-join screen and require all participants to enter a display name. Update the configuration in '/home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js' and apply the changes to the deployment in '~/jitsi'. Verify the policy enforcement at 'http://localhost:8080/PolicyTestRoom' by saving a screenshot of the blocked join state (attempted with an empty name) to '~/Documents/evidence_blocked.png' and a screenshot of a successful join using the name 'Verified User' to '~/Documents/evidence_success.png'.
